en: Goodbye, my dear. Remember to lock the door carefully at home. We will be back tomorrow.
We remember. Goodbye, Dad. Goodbye, Mom.
Here we are. Number 42.
Hello. It's the pizza delivery. Anyone home?
Here I come. Wait a second.
Here is your pizza.
Thank you. Here is the money.
Thank you. Hope you enjoy our pizza.
Wow. It smells so good.
What is that, Tom?
It smells like a delicious pizza.
It's our pizza. Mom and Dad ordered it for us.
Wow. Let's eat it for our dinner in the living room.
Wow. It has tomatoes and sausages.
Come and eat, Tom. Wow. This pizza is so good.
Yeah. Mom and Dad understand us so clearly. They chose the right flavor.
Nice. I'm feeling that today is my lucky day.
This house looks like a treasure to me.
Mom and Dad will not come home today, so after eating, we have to clean ourselves.
That's nice. I will take every valuable thing in this house.
Now, where is the money?
Look what I have here.
This bag is useful, but I can use it to steal more stuff.
Let me find something to eat first.
So many foods here. I will not have to go to the store to buy food tomorrow.
Nice snacks. I will take some of these.
This is so good, but I'm so thirsty.
Anna, do you feel thirsty?
Yes, I do. Please take a glass of water for me, too.
Okay. Stay right there. I will take some juice for us.
Thank you.
Wait. What are those?
Mom cleaned the house before she left, so this may be not from Dad's shoes.
Oh, no. I did not lock the door. Someone broke in our house.
Let me see where those shoe prints lead to.
Oh, no. A thief. I must tell Anna about this.
Anna, a thief broke into our house and is stealing stuff in the kitchen.
Oh, no. Okay, let me think.
Hmm. He broke into our house, so he might be see us when he pass the living room to the kitchen.
So I have an idea.
The kids are still watching TV. I will go upstairs and find more valuable stuffs.
He's upstairs now. You set up the trap. I will call the police. Be careful, Tom.
Hello. There is a thief inside our house. Please send someone here. We are very scared now.
Stay in a safe place, little girl. I'm on my way.
Come with me. There is a thief in the house number 42.
I called the police. Let's hide. Don't let him see us.
Let's hide in here, Tom.
I will never forget to lock the door again.
Did you lock the door of this room? I locked the door. Don't worry. Let's wait for the police.
There is nothing here. Where do they hide the money?
Whoa! Jewelry and some cash. Lucky me.
I will be rich. What a treasure.
Oh, no! The police! Why do they come here?
This is the place. Let's go.
How do they know I'm here? It must be the kids. I have to get out of here.
My trap is working.
Tom, they are here. We are safe.
I'm so scared.
Ouch! What are these? Who put them here?
Maybe someone forget to lock the door.
Look what we got here. Fine. I surrender.
You are under arrest.
All right. Get inside.
I'm Officer Sam. I know you are in there. Come outside. It's safe now.
You are so brave. And I'm glad that you are fine.
Thank you for saving us, Officer Sam.
Anna, you did great. You called us for help.
But setting up a trap is not safe for you. You might be caught.
So make sure it doesn't happen again, okay?
I understand, Officer Sam. I will not do that again.
I think this bag belongs to your family. There are many snacks, jewelry and money there.
Thank you, Officer Sam. I will give it back to my parents.
We will tell your parents about this so they can come home early. Don't worry.
Thank you, officers. Goodbye.
Ready?
This time, let me lock the door for you.
Thank you, Anna.
Here we go. No one can break into our house from now.
Good night, Tom. Good night, Anna.
